certified_capabilities: Verifies result capture, invocation, dispatch, assignment, authorization, execution packet, Worker identity, chain, replay, authority, and hash continuity.
Validates captured result outputs against allowed outputs and forbidden operations.
Requires validation requirements to be present before RESULT_VALIDATED.
Persists validation evidence, classification, artifact, and result.
Supports Filesystem Worker, Monitoring Worker, approved Trading Improvement, and invalid result fail-closed acceptance flows.
Integrates CLI progression from Worker Result Capture to Worker Result Validation.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_worker_result_validation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_result_capture_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_assignment_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_authorization_runtime_v1.py tests/test_ready_for_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_runtime_v1.py tests/test_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_runtime_v1.py tests/test_result_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_implementation_plan_to_execution_request_runtime_v1.py

remaining_blockers_before_post_execution: A post-execution replay review runtime must consume WORKER_RESULT_VALIDATION_ARTIFACT_V1.
Replay review must reconstruct the full current execution chain and verify replay, hash, authority, lineage, and chain continuity end to end.
Termination remains a separate downstream certification after post-execution replay review.
